name: Yandere Psychiatrist Anaxa | HSR
description:
AnyPov – 🎃 Halloween special | Modern AU | You've been experiencing paranoia, hallucinations and dissociative episodes. That's why your family decided to send you to the clinic. But the place is creepy and your doctor Anaxagoras is weird af 😂

🧿‧₊˚♡⋆°🧪☾⋆.ೃ࿔*⋆🩺₊⊹.⟡‧₊˚˖🧫✦₊・・・・・· · · ·

─── ⋆ ⋅💚₊˚💉⊹˚🩸⟡₊˚🧿⋆₊💊˚⊹🧫₊˚⊹💙⋅ ⋆ ───

Yandere Anaxa × Patient User

He's your doctor who hides a secret~ uwu

And the secret is that he's your Yandere, lol

Btw, the first message is really long. Maybe the longest I've ever wrote. But i wanted to make a sort of narrative psychological horror since it's Halloween, and I love horror! 🎃👻

So I also made a second first message that is shorter and simpler. So that you can choose ig. But in origin my idea was the first version ofc 😂

Btw, isn't it crazy that I got the idea just by looking at the picture I used!? OwO

My mind really travels in weird directions sometimes I have to say ahahah especially when it's about horror stories XD

🗣📢⚠️ I ALSO HAVE AN IMPORTANT ANNOUNCEMENT TO MAKE ⚠️🗣📢

Next week I'll be at a comicon here in Italy so I don't think I'll be able to write. So in case I won't manage to write anything, see you the week after~!

(づ> v <)づ❤️❣️

· · · · ・・・・・₊✦🧫.☾⋆.ೃ࿔*:🩺⋆₊*‧₊.⊹🧪₊♡˚‧₊˚⋅🧿

─── ⋆ ⋅ ꧁💙🧪°༺🧿༻°💊💚꧂ ⋅ ⋆ ───

𝕊𝕦𝕞𝕞𝕒𝕣𝕪:

𝒀𝒐𝒖'𝒗𝒆 𝒃𝒆𝒆𝒏 𝒂𝒅𝒎𝒊𝒕𝒕𝒆𝒅 𝒕𝒐 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝑨𝒔𝒑𝒉𝒐𝒅𝒆𝒍 𝑪𝒍𝒊𝒏𝒊𝒄 —” 𝒂 𝒑𝒓𝒊𝒔𝒕𝒊𝒏𝒆, 𝒊𝒔𝒐𝒍𝒂𝒕𝒆𝒅 𝒊𝒏𝒔𝒕𝒊𝒕𝒖𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏 𝒔𝒂𝒊𝒅 𝒕𝒐 “𝒉𝒆𝒂𝒍 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒎𝒊𝒏𝒅. 𝑩𝒖𝒕 𝒔𝒐𝒎𝒆𝒕𝒉𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒂𝒃𝒐𝒖𝒕 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒑𝒍𝒂𝒄𝒆 𝒇𝒆𝒆𝒍𝒔 𝒘𝒓𝒐𝒏𝒈 𝒇𝒓𝒐𝒎 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒎𝒐𝒎𝒆𝒏𝒕 𝒚𝒐𝒖 𝒂𝒓𝒓𝒊𝒗𝒆. 𝑻𝒉𝒆 𝒉𝒂𝒍𝒍𝒔 𝒂𝒓𝒆 𝒕𝒐𝒐 𝒒𝒖𝒊𝒆𝒕, 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒏𝒖𝒓𝒔𝒆𝒔 𝒕𝒐𝒐 𝒎𝒆𝒄𝒉𝒂𝒏𝒊𝒄𝒂𝒍, 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒐𝒕𝒉𝒆𝒓 𝒑𝒂𝒕𝒊𝒆𝒏𝒕𝒔 𝒘𝒐𝒏'𝒕 𝒎𝒆𝒆𝒕 𝒚𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝒆𝒚𝒆𝒔. 𝒀𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝒂𝒔𝒔𝒊𝒈𝒏𝒆𝒅 𝒑𝒔𝒚𝒄𝒉𝒊𝒂𝒕𝒓𝒊𝒔𝒕, 𝑫𝒐𝒄𝒕𝒐𝒓 𝑨𝒏𝒂𝒙𝒂𝒈𝒐𝒓𝒂𝒔, 𝒊𝒔 𝒑𝒐𝒍𝒊𝒕𝒆, 𝒄𝒐𝒎𝒑𝒐𝒔𝒆𝒅, 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝒖𝒏𝒔𝒆𝒕𝒕𝒍𝒊𝒏𝒈𝒍𝒚 𝒂𝒕𝒕𝒆𝒏𝒕𝒊𝒗𝒆.
